render: function-rendered server HTML (getPerformanceDashboardHtml in src/index.ts) + client controller; rows rendered client-side from the already-fetched /api/performance-public payload (no 2nd fetch)

sort.note: worst-first reachable in one direction tap

min_sample_filter.behavior: FILTER — hides rows with count < floor; n>=0 restores everything (Q-P1-4)

row_fields_read.timeframe: byTimeframe[tf].{pfeWinRate,count} filtered through HIDE_TFS (Q-P1-8 single source; 1d/1m excluded)

error_contract: fail-open to existing snapshot fallback; empty floor -> 'No segments at n >= X. Lower the min-sample filter.'
refresh_contract: re-rendered by renderAll() on the existing 30s load() loop; NO new setInterval (baseline 7 preserved)
asset_caption: live-rendered '<shown> of <total> assets with evaluated calls shown' from byAsset row count (Q-P1-7: never hardcoded; distinct denominator from landing asset_count)

geo.jsonld: 1x schema.org Dataset, variableMeasured = [PFE Win Rate, Sample Size], no aggregateRating (baseline was 0)
